title: HOMEOWNERSHIP CENTER - 211info
text: ACCESS HOMEOWNERSHIP CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF HUD-certified counseling agency that provides various homebuyer education programs, housing counseling, foreclosure intervention counseling, and down payment assistance. Also provides financial education and counseling services that includes in-person class online money management courses. 3630 Aviation Way Medford, OR 97504 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm, Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (541) 774-4305 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 774-4305 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Jackson and Josephine Counties Services: Financial Literacy Training Homebuyer/Home Purchase Counseling Mortgage Delinquency and Default Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - COMMUNITY ACTION AGENCY DISASTER SERVICES - CENTER FOR COMMUNITY RESILIENCE FOOD - FOOD PANTRIES FOOD - SENIOR FOOD PANTRIES HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - DURABLE MEDICAL EQUIPMENT PROGRAM HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OVER THE TOP WIG PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - AFFORDABLE HOUSING HOUSING/SHELTER - HOUSING RETENTION PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - JACKSON COUNTY CONTINUUM OF CARE SCREENINGS HOUSING/SHELTER - RENT DEPOSIT ASSISTANCE HOUSING/SHELTER - WEATHERIZATION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SUPPORTIVE SERVICES FOR VETERAN FAMILIES INFORMATION SERVICES - OUTREACH TO SENIORS AND PEOPLE WITH DISABILITIES UTILITIES - ENERGY ASSISTANCE PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ACCESS
